description: Recto: Pen trials in Hebrew and Judaeo-Arabic, including a draft of letter text to 'the dear brother' mentioning Alexandria. Verso: Grocery list or account in Judaeo-Arabic, listing various foods and numbers. Items include flour, cheese, eggplant, lemon, basil, orzo (shaʿīriyya), bread, fish, chickens, watermelon, pepper, mulūkhiyya, and radish. Dating: Late, probably Mamluk or early Ottoman era.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
